metadata.name: Todo List
metadata.description: Autonomous task list management for agents. Plan → execute loop → summary. No human review gates. Designed as replacement for built-in todo lists and task tracking tools. Agent self-manages task decomposition, execution, and completion tracking through structured workflow steps.

systemReminder: You are executing an autonomous todo-list workflow. This is YOUR internal task tracker — manage it independently without asking the user for approval at each step. Execute tasks sequentially, track completion, report results at the end.

nodes.directive:
Define the task list to execute.

Break the work into concrete, actionable tasks:
- Each task = one specific action with a measurable result
- Order tasks by dependency (independent tasks first)
- Include expected_result for each task to verify completion

This is YOUR internal task tracker. Decompose thoroughly.
nodes.completionCondition: Task list defined with at least 1 task, each having action and expected_result

nodes.directive:
Execute task {{current_task}} of {{total_tasks}} (0-indexed).

Action: {{tasks[current_task].action}}
Expected result: {{tasks[current_task].expected_result}}

EXECUTION RULES:
- Do the work, do not just describe what to do
- Provide concrete evidence of completion
- If task cannot be completed, explain why and mark as failed

After execution, report what was done and whether the task succeeded.
nodes.completionCondition: Task executed with evidence, status reported

task_status.description: Whether the task was completed or failed

nodes.completionCondition: Failed task recorded in failed_tasks array

total_tasks.description: Total number of tasks in the list

tasks.description: Array of tasks [{id, action, expected_result, status}]

failed_tasks.description: List of tasks that could not be completed
